name: mcp-unitycatalog
description: A Model Context Protocol server for Unity Catalog providing Unity Catalog Functions as MCP tools.

tools.name: uc_list_functions
tools.description: Lists functions within the specified parent catalog and schema.

tools.name: uc_get_function
tools.description: Gets a function within a parent catalog and schema.

tools.name: uc_create_function
tools.description: Creates a function within a parent catalog and schema. WARNING: This API is experimental and will change in future versions.

tools.name: uc_delete_function
tools.description: Deletes a function within a parent catalog and schema.

env.name: UC_SERVER
env.description: The base URL of the Unity Catalog server.

env.name: UC_CATALOG
env.description: The name of the Unity Catalog catalog.

env.name: UC_SCHEMA
env.description: The name of the schema within a Unity Catalog catalog.

env.name: UC_TOKEN
env.description: The access token used to authorize API requests to the Unity Catalog server.

env.name: UC_VERBOSITY
env.description: The verbosity level for logging. Default: warn.

env.name: UC_LOG_DIRECTORY
env.description: The directory where log files will be stored. Default: .mcp_server_unitycatalog.
